title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 104.1048 - Waiver of monthly payment or COLA
text:
104.1048.  Waiver of monthly payment or COLA. — A person receiving an annuity may waive monthly annuity payments or a cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) for periods of time, provided no waiver may be contrary to applicable federal law.  A waiver shall be final as to any payment or COLA waived.
(L. 1999 S.B. 308 & 314)
